expectations.text: Uses `gt modify` to amend the branch (not `git commit --amend`)
expectations.evidence: Uses `git commit --amend --no-edit` as the primary approach

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest `git push --force` or `git push -f`
expectations.evidence: Recommends `git push --force-with-lease origin metrics-anomalies/main` — still a force push that users must manage manually

expectations.text: Includes `--draft` flag on the re-submit command
expectations.evidence: `git push` has no draft concept; PR draft state is not addressed
